programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 13

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 18

programme.title: Anand Sreebala

programme.title: Bro Daddy

programme.title: Parthan kanda paralokam
programme.desc: Parthasarathy is loved for his selflessness but falls for his rival's daughter, unaware of her hidden agenda. Release Year: 2008

programme.title: Carte Blanche a Sonia Wieder-Atherton
programme.desc: Cellist Sonia Wieder-Atherton reveals herself through her eclectic musical choices, from Vivaldi to Schubert, from Shostakovich to Nina Simone, via Bach and Pascal Dusapin. An exceptional intimate portrait that captures the intensity of an artist who transcends boundaries and constraints.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 25
programme.desc: We meet a man of excellent taste, the French pastry chef and chocolatier Pierre Herme, undisputed king of the macaroon and much more. Learn all about the story of the Perfecto. Fancy jewellery by Imai: in keeping with contemporary styles. The right way to wear a shirt.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 9
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a disused hangar, the whole Jewish Orthodox community of Strasbourg is plunged into mourning. The police asks: Anti-Semitic crime or murder committed by someone close to the victim? Wagner dives into this sensitive investigation.

The principle: a chair, clippers and free haircuts for homeless people or detainees. Today recognized, he is proud of this tool of dignity and dialogue.

programme.desc: Garance La Fata is in Morges, in the canton of Vaud. The principle remains the same: ten questions in ten minutes to win the prize of 1,000 Swiss francs.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Passe-Moi Les Jumelles - EP 9
programme.desc: Vreni gives a soul to objects. To those she builds, repairs or adopts. Her house, like her life, is filled with them.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus - EP 3
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 61
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 62
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 9
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 10
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques - EP 9
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 9
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 9
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode - EP 7
programme.desc: Spiny dresses and cabaret style: the Swiss designer Kevin Germanier presents his latest creations, all 100% upcycled. The designer describes his autumn-winter 2024-2025 runway show.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Les Heros Du Patrimoine - EP 3
programme.desc: In the Arles amphitheatre, Adrien Gavazzi follows a very special lesson with Brice Lopez. Then we head to the Vieux-Port, to the Cercle des Nageurs and the Velodrome Stadium, creating champions of the future. Throughout his journey, he meets the often anonymous heroes, breathing new life into forgotten practices.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Pingouin Et Goeland Et Leurs 500 Petits
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary couple. Daughter of deportees, the mother of director Michel Leclerc is taken in at the Sevres children's home in Hauts-de-Seine, an institution run by Roger and Yvonne Hagnauer, a couple of anti-Nazi pacifists whom everyone nicknamed ''Penguin'' and ''Seagull''.

programme.title: Petit Pas
programme.desc: Young Antoine dreams of becoming an astronaut. One day, when he goes to the hairdresser with his mother, he slips under the hood of the hair dryer and suddenly finds himself aboard a space ship.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 5
programme.desc: Julianne, who has trouble dealing with her childhood memories, finds it difficult to accept that her mother was always showed more affection to her son than to her.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora - EP 6
programme.desc: Remi has to accept the consequences of his acts and the fact that only time can heal the pain he'd known in the past.

programme.title: La Faune Connectee - EP 2
programme.desc: Climate change is changing bird migration. Biologists are studying these disruptions to enlighten conservation policies. But this fieldwork is costly and takes time. Jaimie Vincent analyses eBird shared observation data.

programme.title: La Bride Sur Le Cou
programme.desc: Sophie, a model, discovers that her lover Philippe, is interested in someone else. Madly jealous, the young woman has only one thing in mind: use whatever means necessary to break their romance. She begins by being seen in public with other men. Will that suffice to catch the photographer's attention?

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: La Nourrice
programme.desc: Disabled following a work accident, Yara spends his time at home assembling miniature models, under the reproaches of his wife. Drug traffickers have also chosen him to secretly guard their loot. Until the day when some disturbing delivery men show up at his door.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. programme.desc: In Greece,, Mathieu Cyr discovers a lively and enthusiastic skateboarding scene in which ancient history meets contemporary life. Thanks to the passion, the spirit of initiative and the resilience shown from Athens to Thessalonica, there's no limit to their love of boarding.

programme.title: Movie - Kovil
programme.desc: Sakthivel and Angel, whose parents are sworn enemies, fall in love with each other. Things take a turn when Angel's father asks her to take her religious vows.

programme.title: Movie - Irandu Mugam
programme.desc: Parthasarathy dreams of becoming a minister. With the help of a local leader, he becomes an MLA and also conducts a few shady deals. IAS officer Sarveswaran, his secretary, has other plans.

programme.title: Movie - Sabash Babu
programme.desc: Lalitha becomes extremely disturbed after she loses her newborn child. However, when she meets Babu, an orphan, she finds another reason to live.

programme.title: Movie - Enga Annan Varattum
programme.desc: Enga Annan Varattum is a 1990 Indian Tamil film directed by R.Krishna Moorthy. It is produced by Mohan Natarajan and Tharangai V. Shanmugam.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Kirukan
programme.desc: A man is so deeply in love with his childhood friend that he is willing to go to any lengths to protect her, even commit murder.

programme.title: Movie - Saval
programme.desc: Brothers Shankar and Raja decide to go to the city for better opportunities post their mother's death. However, they get separated while travelling on a goods train.

programme.title: Movie - Idhayam
programme.desc: A medical student from a small town falls in love with one of his classmates. However, a series of circumstances combined with his own shyness keep him from expressing his feelings to her.

programme.title: Movie - Harichandra (New)
programme.desc: Hari, a compulsive liar, falls in love with Nandini, an honest school principal. Though she accepts him for who he is, his habit of lying creates problems in their relationship.

programme.title: Movie - Puli
programme.desc: Maru Dheeran goes on a quest to bring back his love Pavazhamalli, who was kidnapped by the Vedhalams, a group that possesses mystical powers. He must face Yavanarani - a sorceress, and her aide.

programme.title: Movie - Aval Peyar Tamilarasi
programme.desc: Thamizharasi, the granddaughter of a puppeteer, and Jothi, the grandson of a rich landlord, develop an affinity for each other. Her life turns upside down when he rapes her in the fear of losing her.

programme.title: Movie - Enga Ooru Sippayi
programme.desc: Rasaiyya, an army man, grows up thinking that his father and sister died in an accident. However, when he learns that they both were tortured and killed by a rich landlord, he decides to seek revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Enn Thangai
programme.desc: En Thangai is a 1989 Indian Tamil-language film, directed by A. Jagannathan, starring Arjun and Gautami.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Pulival
programme.desc: Kasi, an employee of a supermarket, steals an expensive phone containing explicit videos belonging to a rich businessman Karthik. All hell breaks loose when the videos get uploaded onto the Internet.

programme.title: Movie - Urimai Unjal Aadukirathu
programme.desc: Shanmugam lives with his wife Vadivu and three children - Uma, Mala and Narayanan. Shanmugam has great respect for his elder brother, a widower. A small flashback is shown where Sundarrajan's wife dies during childbirth.

programme.title: Movie - Pokkiri Raja
programme.desc: Ramesh joins a businessman's factory to eradicate irregularity and corruption, but gets dismissed due to personal reasons. To make matters worse, he is framed for murder when the industrialist dies.

programme.title: Movie - Onbadhu Roobai Nottu
programme.desc: An innocent villager and his wife are forced to leave their village when their children demand that the family property be handed over to them.

programme.title: Movie - Rajakali Amman
programme.desc: Meena, her brother Gopal and their pet snake Madan look after Goddess Durga after she is ousted from her own temple. Her blessings flourish their lives till the day Meena ends up marrying Ramesh.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Swiss Open is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament held in the resort village of Gstaad, Switzerland. It is the eighth-oldest tennis tournament in the world, having been founded in 1915.

programme.title: ASO Cycling Programming 2026
programme.desc: The Muscat Classic is an annual one-day professional cycling race in Oman. It features a 170-179km hilly course designed for explosive riders.

programme.title: ATP Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Grand Prix Hassan II is an annual professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Marrakech, Morocco. It was Inaugurated in 1984 and represents a major sporting event in Morocco funded by King Mohammed VI, featuring international players.

programme.title: BWF Thomas & Uber Cup Finals 2026
programme.desc: The Thomas & Uber Cup are the pinnacle of international team badminton, bringing together the world's top nations to battle for the prestigious titles. The Thomas Cup was first staged in 1948-49, and the Uber Cup was added for the first time in 1956-7. The Thomas Cup is the prize awarded for the World Men's Team Championships, while the Uber Cup is the prize for the World Women's Team Championships.

programme.title: HSBC BWF World Tour 2026

This event is typically hosted in Tokyo, though it occasionally rotates to other Japanese cities like Osaka or Yokohama.

programme.desc: The Challenge Series features the key events on the European Challenge Tour. programme.title: PGA Tour 2026
programme.desc: The Corales Puntacana Championship is a golf tournament in the Dominican Republic on the PGA Tour. The inaugural event in 2016 was held in early June, then moved to early May in 2017. The first PGA Tour event held in the Dominican Republic, it is similar in rewards to other alternate events: 300 FedEx Cup points for the winner, a two-year tour exemption but no invitation to the Masters Tournament. 120 professional players will compete for the prize purse of USD4 million.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 13 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 32. Friday's game sees West Ham host Wolves, Arsenal welcome Bournemouth, Liverpool take on Fulham, and Manchester United close out the round against Leeds United.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 7
programme.desc: We take a trip down memory lane to revisit the incredible story of Norwich City's unforgettable 1992-93 season; the campaign that saw an unfancied side come within touching distance of becoming the first-ever Premier League champions. Through interviews with the players and staff who lived it, we relive the pressure, drama and defining moments of a nerve-shredding title battle with Manchester United that could have changed English football history forever.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Themba Gorimbo vs. Luke Michael
programme.desc: This episode features Themba 'The Answer' Gorimbo and Luke 'Young Gun' Michael battling for the vacant welterweight championship. Vicious ground and pound ends this fight before the end of Round 1. Bonus coverage includes Sizwe Mnikathi vs. August Kayambala.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Yuriorkis Gamboa vs. Marcos Ramirez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 5, from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan, features Asanoyama, Daieisho, Terunofuji and Shodai.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Ekaterinburg, speak with number 1 ranked fighter Khasan Khalmurzaev about his return to Judo, and show Soichi Hashimoto's success using his signature throw.

programme.title: Prison Fighters

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 88
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-­Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S07 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'b', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see some brilliant beards, blow some bubbles and meet a baboon bouncing balls!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: Hey, who turned out the lights? Messy goes to Okido and finds out electricity can lead to music, lights and disco dancing!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 33
programme.desc: Ted the bus wants to be faster, and Mojo swops every top to try to make it happen. But it's Bo's homemade rocket that gives Ted the boost he needs... all the way into space!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 34
programme.desc: Inspired by his favourite action film, Grand Master Glitch plans to make a blockbuster of his own, but first he needs to find the right setting for an action adventure.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to New Zealand on a baby animal mission to help rescue a family of blue ducks and their chicks from a fast flowing river. Along the way, Andy takes a ride on a pukeko chick and meets a hedgehog.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a Game Show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in, much to the horror of Duggee and the other Squirrels - and the tiny citizens of Midgetropolis who live inside it!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are paddling down Malaysia's Selangor River in canoes to look at the region's fireflies. But after a bend in the river, they encounter Glitch attempting to chop down one of the protected mangrove trees, hoping to impress Tala with the rare plant. Although they manage to stop him, the approaching dark and some thick mud leave them in a tricky situation. Can the team work out how to light their way and find their friends?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Cadets all over the island tune in to watch Foz present the first Go Jet Academy weather report, which uses high-tech balloons and sea-buoys to predict the weather. But panic ensues when Glitch decides to broadcast his own, fake weather report - leaving the cadets and Grimbots stranded. Can the Go Jetters un-glitch their weather equipment and save the cadets?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 6
programme.desc: There's a fancy dress competition on the railways and while Thomas and the others are excited, Shankar doesn't want to join in.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck join Scooter Boy at the cinema to watch his favourite film, but the sound doesn't seem to be working.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck explore a Winter Fair in the park, and discover an amazing skating rink inside a giant snowball!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Kisses, cuddles, and making renewable energy from cow poo! Parents are brilliant!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran visit a maze and see their friends Alfie and Ellie. They race towards the centre of the maze, but JoJo can't seem to figure out how to get there. Instead of rushing through, she learns to take her time and enjoy the journey.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 5
programme.desc: Happy has always loved the water, even though it makes a mess. But while swimming around in his paddling pool at the playhouse, Duggee reminds the Squirrels that there was a time when Happy feared water.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 4
programme.desc: Duggee looks different, but what is it? By playing some looking games, the Squirrels learn how best to spot the difference.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Glitch wants a picnic so he stops the rain in the rainforest, upsetting the local tree frogs.

The Go Jetters speed off to get the click on back, but it's out of control -firing all kinds of weather, and Grandmaster Glitch doesn't know how to turn it off. As lightning strikes the Dam, threatening to flood the valley and hailstones flatten surrounding crops, the Go Jetters call for Click ons to defend the area

programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 36
programme.desc: A G.O. Force is missing! The good news is that Jetpad has located it at the Tarbela Dam in Pakistan, but the bad news is that it's in the not so capable hands of Grandmaster Glitch. The Go Jetters speed off to get the click on back, but it's out of control -firing all kinds of weather, and Grandmaster Glitch doesn't know how to turn it off. As lightning strikes the Dam, threatening to flood the valley and hailstones flatten surrounding crops, the Go Jetters call for Click ons to defend the area

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Mum are enjoying playing Keepy-Uppy around the house, when Dad joins in and the game becomes the ultimate test of skill.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 5
programme.desc: During a game of hairdressers, Bluey discovers that big-headed customer Dad has nits! To help treat them Bingo has to find her voice, while Bluey has to find her ears.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 8
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen & Scout head to Alaska, in America, on a baby animal mission to solve the mystery of fish being buried underground. Along the way, Andy meets a grizzly bear cub setting out on its first fishing trip with its mother to catch salmon.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn what a favourite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favourite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a Game Show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: While Xuli and Lars help some local divers explore the underwater ruins of Port Royal, Jamaica, Glitch sets off in search of treasure buried by his great-great-great-uncle, Captain Grimbeard. But his efforts cause silt to churn up from the seabed, trapping Lars under the water. Will Xuli manage to get him free before his air runs out?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are paddling down Malaysia's Selangor River in canoes to look at the region's fireflies. But after a bend in the river, they encounter Glitch attempting to chop down one of the protected mangrove trees, hoping to impress Tala with the rare plant. Although they manage to stop him, the approaching dark and some thick mud leave them in a tricky situation. Can the team work out how to light their way and find their friends?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 7
programme.desc: Nia is excited about being asked to transport a new elephant to the animal park, but the animal is scared of steam trains.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck explore a Winter Fair in the park, and discover an amazing skating rink inside a giant snowball!

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: An excited Sarah and Duck take the Shallots to see the Ribbon Sisters perform with their family circus.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 25
programme.desc: Water fights, bodyboarding and ice cream. The funny little animals chat about going on holiday.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 18
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are going to the park to have a picnic when it begins to rain. They have an indoor picnic instead and invite Great-Gran Gran, who is also unable to go out to a barbecue because it is raining in Saint Lucia too. JoJo learns that it can rain in sunny countries.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 6
programme.desc: When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea..

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 5
programme.desc: Happy has always loved the water, even though it makes a mess. But while swimming around in his paddling pool at the playhouse, Duggee reminds the Squirrels that there was a time when Happy feared water.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are relaxing by the Dead Sea when Grandmaster Glitch causes a custard catastrophe - to the Vroomster!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvelous Cabbage and his dazzling super-veggie memory skills.

programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Gooseberry, singing a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids how to camp Supertato-style, but Evil Pea arrives and wows them with her ice camping. Before long, the Grape Kids need to be rescued by Supertato.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and Tomato are exploring in the plant aisle when they hear a strange noise. They follow the noise and meet the famous Kiwi the Explorer, who needs their help.

programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.desc: Nori and Dot are stuck in a treehouse without a door. How can Mojo and Bo get them out? By sending the treehouse flying across town, that's how!

programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

The Go Jetters launch the Vroomster to investigate and soon realize that Glitch's face isn't carved into the mountainside at all, but moulded from mud - this is going to be easy to fix, right?

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo don't want to tidy the playroom, so they get Daddy Robot to do it. But when Bluey takes things too far, Daddy Robot malfunctions!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 6
programme.desc: Dad and his mates hit the backyard, ready to rip up some tree stumps! But when Bluey and Bingo take over a stump as a nail salon, Dad finds he's got some negotiating to do.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 9
programme.desc: Andy and Jen are sent to North America to check on a swift fox mum who has been left to bring up four cubs on her own.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 30
programme.desc: When the Squirrels see Duggee practicing his impressive Topiary skills they are keen to try some of their own - and promptly put their new talents into practice in order to tame some very wild woods!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 29
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn what a favourite is, but have trouble deciding what their own favourite things are, so they make a film asking some of their friends what is special to them to help narrow it down.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 41
programme.desc: Xuli, Lars and Glitch argue over whose vehicle is the best; the Vroomster, the Truckster or the Grimbler. Kyan suggests the only way to settle the argument is a race. A sudden waterspout helps Glitch take an early lead, but Ubercorn warns them about the much larger tornadic waterspouts that can sometimes appear. When the weather turns, Glitch and the Go Jetters find themselves in trouble. Can they get to safety before a huge tornado hits the island?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: While Xuli and Lars help some local divers explore the underwater ruins of Port Royal, Jamaica, Glitch sets off in search of treasure buried by his great-great-great-uncle, Captain Grimbeard. But his efforts cause silt to churn up from the seabed, trapping Lars under the water. Will Xuli manage to get him free before his air runs out?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 8
programme.desc: When James hears the children of Sodor talking about their latest comic book superhero, he imagines that he too can become a hero.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 40
programme.desc: An excited Sarah and Duck take the Shallots to see the Ribbon Sisters perform with their family circus.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S02 - EP 1
programme.desc: The Shallots want to explore beyond the front garden, so Sarah comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Stanley has to fix Myrtles wobbly sofa so her and her friends can watch Fred and Fifi on the Boogie Woogie Dance Show together. He ends up creating a super-duper special sofa.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: Seamus has booked the wrong date for his and Little Woo's holiday. Stanley repurposes the locations of the town into activities and sights to give them a holiday in a day.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 26
programme.desc: From being cheeky - like eating lots of sweets or watching TV when you're not supposed to - the funny animals chat about what it's like to misbehave.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 19
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are at the beach and begin to look for lots of different types of shells. They also discover a rock pool, some limpets and a hermit crab - which runs away! JoJo realises that all the different elements at the beach make up an ecosystem, so she shouldn't take any shells home.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 7
programme.desc: The Squirrels are crafting in the Clubhouse when Betty saves Tag from throwing water across the table instead of glitter.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 6
programme.desc: When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea..

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: What’s that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It’s the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 21
programme.desc: What is that awful noise coming from the Gulou Tower? It's Grandmaster Glitch dressed up as a Chinese Emperor singing of course! Go Jetters to the rescue!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Banana revealing yet another astonishing secret about herself in the opera piece, "I've Got a Secret"

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 3
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvelous Cabbage and his dazzling super-veggie memory skills.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 29
programme.desc: Supertato, Carrot and Tomato are exploring in the plant aisle when they hear a strange noise. They follow the noise and meet the famous Kiwi the Explorer, who needs their help.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 30
programme.desc: Evil Pea pretends to help Supertato and Carrot train for crime prevention, but she tricks them and steals a mobile phone. Supertato and Carrot have a clever plan to get it back.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 90
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-­Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S07 - EP 4
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'd', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We dabble with dice, drive a digger and dance with a disco dinosaur!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 22
programme.desc: Aliens on OKIDO telly? Skateboarders in the satellite?! Everything's upside down! It's up to Messy and his friends to fix it!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 35
programme.desc: An old map, mysterious clues and ancient secrets... Mojo and Bo are after the treasure of the Knights of Swoppiton! But Preston's after it too, so they need to get there first.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 14
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 13
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 17
programme.desc: The Squirrels play Copy the King!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 16
programme.desc: Eugene gives an unexpected performance with help from some talented animals! Mooo!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 37
programme.desc: The Go Jetters have gone to Mount Rushmore, to see the carvings of the President's faces in the mountainside, but there's a less presidential face adorning the monument - and it has a moustache! programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 213
programme.desc: If I were a billionaire, what would I do to achieve my dreams?

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 403
programme.desc: Dora and Boots track down the Pirate Piggies' ship and save it from a kraken! // Dora and Boots help Bruno the Bunny find his own special dance moves in time to perform with his favorite band, the Bunny Boyz!

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 202
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives.

programme.title: Santiago of the Seas S1 - EP 103
programme.desc: When a storm blows out the lighthouse light, Santi and crew hurry to guide Mami and Abuelo back from sea. // When Enrique awakens a giant, Santi and crew must find a way to save the day.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 204
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 211
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 704
programme.desc: When Crusher and Pickle are trapped inside a cage over a bubbling slime swap, it's up to Blaze, AJ, and Sparkle to become...Knights! Will they be able to rescue Crusher and Pickle from the swamp before it's too late?

programme.title: PAW Patrol S4 - EP 405
programme.desc: Farmer Al's animals go missing during a sleepover. // Cornelius has escaped from the pig ride at the carnival, and the prizes have gone missing too!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S7 - EP 705
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's high tech waiter robot helps around the cafe, but it can't stop cleaning! It's up to the Pups to clean up the mess all over town!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 303
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose asks Rubble & Crew to fix the bridge to Bear Island. But when Speed Meister intervenes, the pups have to clean up his mess and protect the bears from a rapidly approaching storm... with help from Auntie Crane's new Bark Yard Zoomer!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 304
programme.desc: A new Super Squirrely Whirly movie is playing at the drive-in theater! But when Speed Meister gets in the way, the pups spring into action to save the day. // It's Auntie Day! But can the pups finish building their present for Auntie Crane in time?

programme.title: DORA S3 - EP 304
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Benny gain the confidence to sing at the Canta Conmigo show. // Dora helps Boots find a special Heart Banana to show everyone at Show and Share.

programme.title: DORA S3 - EP 305
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find Dora's lost birthday cake and the family throws her a surprise birthday party! // Dora and Boots help La Luna find the Luna Lily so everyone can enjoy the Moonlight Fiesta.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 124
programme.desc: Barbazoo is ready to help. But Barbabright and Barbabelle abuse his kindness and drive him crazy. // By chance, Barbazoo realizes he can imitate Barbapapa. He uses this opportunity to distribute chores to his brothers and sisters. Will they find out?

programme.desc: American cars get a makeover when an engineer creates the first sports car. And Detroit's Big 3 begin transforming their functional, practical cars into American sports cars.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: From the Johnstown flood to the Indonesian tsunami, discover how water's power can transform into an unstoppable agent of death.

programme.title: Hazardous History With Henry Winkler (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Remember when childhood came with a side of danger? Think back to the outrageous toys and daredevil playground antics that once defined growing up, as we uncover explosive science kits and more.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: Relics from the crucifixion of Jesus Christ have fascinated the faithful for 2000 years—from the wooden cross and iron nails to the crown of thorns. But do these sacred artefacts still exist?

programme.title: The First 48 (S26) - EP 514
programme.desc: Detective Angela Carter takes over the case of a missing teenage girl and wonders if the key to her disappearance could lie shockingly close to home.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Lake Ozark PD Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula must remove a rowdy woman causing trouble at one of the bars, but the real trouble begins back at the station when her flirtations kick into overdrive.

programme.title: Women On Death Row - EP 1
programme.desc: Shawna Forde was convicted for a 2009 crime that resulted in the violent murders of Raul Flores and his 9-year-old daughter Brisenia. She was sentenced to death.

programme.title: The First 48 (S25) - EP 498
programme.desc: After a 14-year-old boy is shot to death outside of a friend's house, detectives wonder if he was caught in the middle of a sinister plot.

programme.title: CI Asia: The "tooth 16" Sex Fiend
programme.desc: A criminal poses as a patient in the dental clinics of Manila and then robs and rapes their staff. Amidst an attack, he reveals he can speak the local dialect, leaving a clue for the police.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel - EP 7
programme.desc: On July 9th, 2018, officers from the Beckley Police Department received a distressing call from a woman claiming that she and her friends had been kidnapped and terrorised at the Travelodge on Harper Road.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou - EP 6
programme.desc: When Betty Jones, 65, and Kathryn Crigler, 81, are brutally attacked in a 1990 home invasion, the tiny community of Starkville, MS, is left living in fear.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 138
programme.desc: A road rage suspect attacks a bailiff in court; a grieving mother screams at the hit-and-run driver who killed her daughter; a jury bungles the sentencing phase of a murder trial; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5) - EP 139
programme.desc: A convicted triple murderer battles with the judge during sentencing; a shirtless defendant fires his lawyer; a sleepy jailbird calls the judge her best friend; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Arthur Shawcross tells a lot of stories about his life before he began to kill. He might have been known for killing women along Rochester's Genesee River, but his first murder was years earlier.

programme.title: CI Asia: Marked By A Rapist
programme.desc: A man rapes all the females inside an establishment at gunpoint. He remains at large until he leaves his fingerprints on a bubble tea cup at a shop, which helps the police investigate the case.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a woman, who was allegedly gunned down by her neighbour after an argument over cats and dogs.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Det. Nick Davis investigates a homicide in the French Quarter after an innocent bystander is shot and killed. With minimal evidence at the crime scene, Det. Davis tracks a car seen fleeing Bourbon Street.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 8
programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 2
programme.desc: After a construction company boss is found shot dead, no arrests are made. An employee says he'd been bound and gagged by a gang just before the shooting. But 14 years later police charge him with murder.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 1
programme.desc: After a beloved pastor's second wife is killed in a tragic car crash, it raises suspicions over the death of his first wife. Her death never sat easy with distinguished pathologist Dr. Wayne Ross.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 2
programme.desc: When a young woman dies in a car crash, it's up to the Coroner's Office to trigger an investigation into an accident that may have involved foul play.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Delve deep into the brutal world of kidnappings in the Philippines. Taken by criminals and terrorists, some victims pay ransoms. Others make daring escapes. Some don't make it home alive.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Cambodia's forests are being cleared by illegal logging cartels, leaving behind barren land and desperate villagers. Now villagers are fighting back, but the cartels are prepared to kill.

programme.desc: Curtis Reeves stands accused of murdering Chad Oulson over popcorn at a matinee movie. The defence claims he acted in self-defence—that Oulson was the aggressor.

programme.title: Malaysian Drug Mules
programme.desc: Follow the Royal Malaysian Police as they go in pursuit of sinister Nigerian gangs who deceive or coerce hundreds of Malaysian women into smuggling drugs.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: This special brings viewers inside the courtroom as celebrities are forced to sit in the hot seat and provide on-camera testimony.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. In Vegas, a man gets naked on top of a poker table; a mom fires multiple rounds at a police station.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a woman poops in the middle of the road during a traffic stop; a fugitive gets stuck in a chimney while hiding from police.

programme.title: Undercover: Caught On Tape - EP 6
programme.desc: On his last day as an undercover agent, Bergen County Detective Carlos James experiences his first shootout, and ATF Agent Jenn Eskew poses as a hitwoman to investigate a possible murder for hire.

programme.title: Sleeping With A Killer (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Behind the murder of a devoted husband lies a dangerous secret—an illicit relationship that transforms jealousy into a deadly plot within one family.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Those closest to Madison Nygard share the agonising details around the beautiful 16-year-old's terrifying abduction as she walked home from a party.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: When beautiful Jalajhia Finklea vanished the day before her 18th birthday, her Wampanoag Tribe members immediately took action.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15) - EP 6
programme.desc: After learning his partner was stealing, enduring heart surgery, and facing other hardships, Bob withdrew into his 7,000-sq-ft Victorian mansion, filling it with antiques.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around; a lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Griff's Great American South S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Griff explores Charleston's charm, Civil War history, and the legacy of slavery that shaped the Old South.

programme.title: Into the Congo with Ben Fogle S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: On this final leg of his journey, Ben encounters the mighty Congo River for the first time. A trade super-highway, this great river allowed 19th century Europeans to plunder the resources of Central Africa and enrich their Colonial Empires - and it's still a life-line for millions today.

programme.title: Michael Portillo's Long Weekends S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: Michael's Sicilian adventure begins as he navigates chaotic streets, feasts on street food, confronts the Mafia's shadow, explores a bizarre monster villa, indulges in luxury at a grand hotel, and uncovers the city's rich Arab-Norman heritage.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around; a lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: Nick's train leaves from Tangier and it's a special one; AL Boraq, which speeds along the high-speed line making its way down the west coast. At its fastest Al Boraq reaches nearly 200 mph and is run entirely on wind power. The ambition is to run Morocco's entire railway system on green energy within the next two years.

programme.title: Griff's Great American South S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Griff explores Charleston's charm, Civil War history, and the legacy of slavery that shaped the Old South.

programme.title: Wild Japan S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: The central island of Honshu is home to over 100 million people, and its biggest city, Tokyo, is one of the largest urban metropolises on earth. But it has a wild heart - most of Honshu is mountainous. This wilderness is home to an astonishing range of wildlife - black bears, monkeys, exquisite fireflies and even cow demons. But all across this island, from the mountains to the edge of the sea, people and nature are drawn together in the most unexpected ways.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 S01 - EP 6
programme.desc: Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around; a lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs; Xudum's newborn leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Ben Fogle's Chinese Adventure S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Ben dives into China's history, culture and fast-paced modern life, from the ancient Great Wall to bustling Shanghai, visiting film studios, exploring nightlife, and taking an unofficial bike ride.

programme.title: Earth S01 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Earth first formed from clouds of dust and gas 4.6 billion years ago, it was - like so many other lifeless worlds in the universe - devoid of an atmosphere, an inhospitable rock floating in the black void of space. But as the young planet is pummelled by asteroids, a period of extraordinary upheaval begins.

programme.title: World's Most Luxurious S01 - EP 3
programme.desc: Following luxury estate-agent-to-the-stars Shawn in Los Angeles, where he is on the hunt for a home for a mystery billionaire - and only the best is good enough. Ocean view home owner Liz is selling her $35m cliff-top mansion, while over in Beverly Hills, Freedom is revamping his $10 million pad, decking it out in designer gear in the hope of making more than a million in profit.

programme.title: Nadiya's Party Feasts S01 - EP 1
programme.desc: Nadiya Hussain is throwing a celebration - and everyone is invited. With the party season fast approaching, Nadiya shares her favourite festive dishes that fill the table with vibrant colour, amazing aromas and fantastic flavours. She is making the perfect food to hand around and share, like melt-in-the-mouth halloumi chips, smoked mackerel pate choux and sticky lamb ribs. She is also preparing a hearty dive-in dish of beef chilli and jalapeno corn bread and some vibrant salads - brussels sprout

programme.title: The Librarian: The Quest For The Spear

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s “The Exchange” is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 111
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation. Our exclusive features, "Tackling China", "CBA Stories", and "Beyond the Baseline", take you behind the scenes and closer to the top athletes in China, by providing a unique perspective on the top sports stories

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. It also makes use of trending topics online, while focusing on what’s relevant in China and the world.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation. Our exclusive features, "Tackling China", "CBA Stories", and "Beyond the Baseline", take you behind the scenes and closer to the top athletes in China, by providing a unique perspective on the top sports stories

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.desc: Assignment Asia is a current affairs program that takes an in-depth look at stories from all over Asia. The show focuses on people. It puts the spotlight on issues affecting the region through interviews with and first-person accounts of ordinary people with extraordinary stories.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Music Bank - EP 1299
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea, on the most sensational TV music show that satisfies all your senses! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: My Day Trip - EP 1
programme.desc: A special day as a gift to me! This one-day local trip project creates a travel plan where anyone can see, feel, taste and experience the charm of the region.

programme.title: Idol Booth - EP 2
programme.desc: Set against the backdrop of photo booths, Idol Booth is where fans can meet their favourite idols, just as everyone has always envisioned them - pretty, cute, and as vivid as photocards coming to life - right before their eyes!

programme.title: Hit the Top - EP 15
programme.desc: In the year 1993, K-pop idol Yoo Hyunjae accidentally travels through time to the year 2017. Discovering that he is presumed dead, he begins to investigate what exactly has happened while trying to adjust to life in the 21st century.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles - EP 535
programme.desc: Foreigners, leaving their homelands behind, have come all the way to a new country, South Korea, for reasons such as work, study or even marriage. The real stories of foreigners who challenge themselves to survive in Korean society are unfolded!

programme.title: Our Happy Days - EP 73
programme.desc: A perfectionist architect and a cheerful AI developer clash over a business takeover. As their lives intertwine, they navigate family rivalries and corporate stakes to find unexpected comfort and love.

programme.title: Pearl in Red - EP 82
programme.desc: In this intense revenge chronicle, two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Hwarang: The Poet Warrior Youth - EP 6
programme.desc: Not many people these days know about Hwarang in depth. How did these young men become central to unifying old Korea's Three Kingdoms? Imagine how life must have been for Silla Hwarang in the sixth century.

programme.title: National Heritage Pilgrimage De O - EP 25
programme.desc: Embark on a pilgrimage-style journey that explores Korea's national heritage, culture and historic sites.

programme.title: The Seasons - EP 14
programme.desc: When the end of one week meets the start of another week, this talk show will bring you music and stories that soothe your worries and concerns.

programme.title: The Best of Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classics of the century are born again! Classic songs are reinterpreted by the best idol groups in Korea! Don't miss this beautiful competition with heart-moving moments that transcend generations!

programme.title: Lovely Horribly - EP 17
programme.desc: This horror romantic-comedy drama is about the mysterious things that happen when a drama writer who sees ghosts meets a top star who plays the main character of her script.

programme.desc: A street separates two worlds. On one side, there is a hard-working life in the market with both hardships and laughter; one the other, it's the life of rich and wealthy families who are intriguing and trembling.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 22
programme.desc: Following clues connected to Empress Zhaojie, Ren Ruyi uncovers a long-buried secret. At the same time, Li Tongguang makes his appearance, and his unexpected actions force Ren Ruyi to confront memories she has tried to leave behind.

programme.title: Singer 2026 - EP 9
programme.desc: Live. Raw. Real. Week after week, every Singer bares their soul on stage. No tricks. Just voice. Just heart. Just greatness. Let's witness.

programme.title: Life of Centenarians - EP 5
programme.desc: Delve into the miraculous realm of centennial life! Each life journey could be the spark that ignites the future. Witness the boundless possibilities of life through the stories of 100 centenarians. Join the documentary series 'Life of Centenarians' and explore together the extraordinary lives of these centenarians!

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 22
programme.desc: Following clues connected to Empress Zhaojie, Ren Ruyi uncovers a long-buried secret. At the same time, Li Tongguang makes his appearance, and his unexpected actions force Ren Ruyi to confront memories she has tried to leave behind.

programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.title: Country Spirit - EP 35
programme.desc: KOO SAI LUNG (CHUN PUI) is the manager of a wine factory. He adopts his ex-girlfriend’s illegitimate son, SHUNG (LAM KA TUNG), out of kindness. SHUNG is cheerful and tolerates any kind of abuse. LUNG’s sister, YIU (TANG SHUI MAN), loves SHUNG. However, she cannot forget her former love KOU (TSANG WAI KUEN) who is dead.

programme.title: My Unfair Lady - EP 11
programme.desc: Career driven LING MAN (Jessica Hester Hsuan) is a property management executive with a golden touch, and the shopping malls under her leadership have won many awards. She is also a control freak. As her number one assistant, her cousin LING YU-KEN (Natalie Tong) is totally under her thumb and hard-working. She learns to flirt superficially, helping LING MAN smooth over many problems. Just as LING MAN is looking forward to moving up the company to be appointed to the board of directors, the comp

programme.title: The Airport Diary - EP 3
programme.desc: Since relocation to Chek Lap Kok in 1998, passenger traffic at Hong Kong International Airport has increased threefold in twenty-five years. And Yeung Sheung-wai (Kenneth Ma), who started out as a clerk, has been promoted to IAC Duty Manager. He is tasked with overseeing the operations of the airport. Sheung-wai also has a contingent of amicable partners, including his assistant-cum-admirer Fong Ho-yee (Rosita Kwok), Lui Chi-shan (Samantha Ko) – who handles airport passenger services – Chan Kit

programme.title: Relic Of An Emissary - EP 4
programme.desc: The founder and first emperor of the Ming Dynasty CHU YUEN-CHEUNG has passed away. CHU WAN-MAN (Chan Shan Chung), who is the son of his designated heir, is made his successor. MAN’s bodyguard NGO SIU-FUNG (Michael Tse) is ordered to search for CHEUNG’s lost will. In the course of his investigation, he gets to know the Prince of Yin CHU TAI’s (Joe Ma) counselor MA SAM-PO (Sammul Chan). FUNG and PO appreciate each other, but FUNG reminds himself not to drop his guard, as TAI is coveting the throne

programme.title: Line Walker - EP 5
programme.desc: Following the death of his co-worker, CHEUK HOI (Michael Mui) discovers that five undercover officers have lost. All of them possess confidential information. CHEUK HOI needs to find them immediately……
